mapper.sql: id, parent_id, name, path, component, icon, sort, menu_type, permission, visible, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = FALSE ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, icon = #{icon}, sort = #{sort}, menu_type = #{menuType}, permission = #{permission}, visible = #{visible}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
UPDATE sys_menu SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
